# Wave 8 — Customer Credential Readiness
<!-- Auto-generated by Wave 8 Gate Commander — 2026-05-07 -->

> Run: `py scripts/dealix_customer_credentials_check.py` to see live status.
> Policy: PRESENT / MISSING / OPTIONAL / BLOCKED_BY_POLICY / DEMO_FALLBACK — never prints actual values.

## Required for First Customer Launch

| Credential | Status | Source | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| DATABASE_URL | REQUIRED | Railway | Auto-provided by Railway Postgres |
| APP_SECRET_KEY | REQUIRED | Railway | Generate: `python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"` |
| CALENDLY_URL | REQUIRED | .env | Already configured |
| WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN | REQUIRED | Meta | For inbound webhook verification |

## Required Before Live Payments

| Credential | Status | Gate | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| MOYASAR_SECRET_KEY | BLOCKED_BY_POLICY | NO_LIVE_CHARGE | Do not configure until founder manually approves |
| MOYASAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET | BLOCKED_BY_POLICY | NO_LIVE_CHARGE | Same — bank transfer is safe default |

## Optional (Enhances Experience)

| Credential | Status | Integration | First Customer Needed |
|---|---|---|---|
| WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN | OPTIONAL | WhatsApp Business | NO — use personal WA |
| HUBSPOT_API_KEY | OPTIONAL | HubSpot CRM | NO |
| LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY | OPTIONAL | Langfuse | NO |
| LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY | OPTIONAL | Langfuse | NO |
| POSTHOG_API_KEY | OPTIONAL | PostHog | NO |
| SENTRY_DSN | OPTIONAL | Sentry | NO |
| RESEND_API_KEY | OPTIONAL | Resend | NO |
| SLACK_BOT_TOKEN | OPTIONAL | Slack | NO |
| GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON | OPTIONAL | Google Sheets/Drive | NO |
| OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT | OPTIONAL | OpenTelemetry | NO |

## Hard Policy Rules
- **NEVER** commit actual credentials to git (use .env, Railway env vars, or secrets manager)
- **NEVER** print actual credential values in logs or console output
- **NEVER** mock credentials in tests that touch external services
- Script `scripts/dealix_customer_credentials_check.py` only prints PRESENT/MISSING, never values

## Setup Instructions (Arabic / English)
- **Arabic:** أضف المتغيّرات المطلوبة في Railway Dashboard → Variables. لا تلصق مفاتيح حقيقية في أي ملف يُرفع إلى git.
- **English:** Add required variables in Railway Dashboard → Variables. Never paste real keys in any file committed to git.
